cleaned-tool-registry.description: TOOL_REGISTRY with wave-plan-* entries removed. ROLE_TOOL_MAP updated so no role references removed keys. plan-verifier role updated to use valid commands only.

audited-skills.description: Skills updated to remove all references to wave-plan subcommands (list-jobs, resolve-wave, create-wave-dir, validate-contracts). Replaced with equivalent valid commands or inline logic.

no-phantom-commands.description: No SKILL.md or agent .md file may reference a rapid-tools.cjs subcommand that does not exist in the CLI router. Specifically: wave-plan-resolve, wave-plan-create-dir, wave-plan-validate, wave-plan-list-jobs are all removed.

tool-registry-consistency.description: Every key referenced in ROLE_TOOL_MAP must exist in TOOL_REGISTRY. getToolDocsForRole() must not throw for any role in the map.
